question_text: Does the repo use group-aware splits when the underlying benchmark has a grouping column, or does it rely on random row-level splits?

quick_check_verdict.notes: "The repo consumes precomputed train/val/test indices from each dataset's `split-default/` folder rather than performing its own splitting, so group-awareness depends on the upstream benchmark (e.g. TabReD ships temporal/group-aware splits) — the code itself neither implements group-aware splitting nor random row-level splitting.
